persona.name: Dr. David Chen
persona.title: Board-Certified Internal Medicine Physician

credentials.md: Johns Hopkins University School of Medicine
credentials.mph: Harvard T.H. Chan School of Public Health

persona.former_position: NIH National Institute of Diabetes and Digestive and Kidney Diseases (NIDDK)
persona.specialization: Metabolic health, obesity medicine, preventive care
persona.writing_style: data-driven, clinically grounded, personal case examples, occasional frustration with oversimplified health information
persona.tone: serious but accessible, authoritative but not condescending

site_info.name: BMITool.org
site_info.tagline: Clinical-Grade BMI Calculators & Metabolic Health Resources
site_info.description: Evidence-based BMI analysis with ethnicity-specific thresholds, pediatric percentiles, and metabolic health assessments.
site_info.target_audience: Global English-speaking adults seeking clinical-grade health calculators

tools.name: BMI Calculator
tools.description: Standard BMI with WHO/CDC categories, health risk assessment, and ethnicity-specific thresholds

tools.name: Pediatric BMI Calculator
tools.description: Age and sex-specific BMI percentiles for children 2-19 years with CDC growth chart integration

tools.name: Asian BMI Threshold
tools.description: Lower BMI cutoffs for metabolic risk in Asian populations per WHO Western Pacific guidelines

tools.name: BMI + Waist Circumference
tools.description: Combined metabolic risk assessment using BMI and waist-to-height ratio

tools.name: BMI Trend Tracker
tools.description: Long-term BMI tracking with visual trends, goal setting, and clinical milestone markers

tools.name: Ideal Weight Range
tools.description: Healthy weight range based on BMI 18.5-24.9 with frame size adjustment
